name: openshift-ai-roks-da
description: Deployable Architecture for OpenShift AI on Red Hat OpenShift on IBM Cloud (ROKS)
long_description: This Deployable Architecture provisions a complete OpenShift AI environment on IBM Cloud, including VPC infrastructure, Red Hat OpenShift cluster, OpenShift Data Foundation for storage, and OpenShift AI with all necessary components for AI/ML workloads.

features.title: VPC Infrastructure
features.description: Multi-zone VPC with subnets, security groups, and public gateways

features.title: Red Hat OpenShift
features.description: Managed OpenShift cluster with configurable worker pools

features.title: OpenShift Data Foundation
features.description: Persistent storage with block, file, and object storage classes

features.title: OpenShift AI
features.description: Complete AI/ML platform with notebooks, pipelines, and model serving

features.title: Observability
features.description: Optional integration with IBM Cloud Monitoring and Logging

architecture.descriptions: Standard deployment with VPC, ROKS, ODF, and OpenShift AI

features.title: OpenShift AI
features.description: Full AI/ML platform with all components

diagrams.description: Architecture diagram showing VPC, ROKS cluster, ODF storage, and OpenShift AI components

profiles.profile_name: IBM Cloud Framework for Financial Services
